title: eutaxia lutea
intro: Eutaxia lutea, a flowering plant native to Australia, is a species of shrub in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as a yellow bush pea. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eutaxia lutea are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Eutaxia lutea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
